---
title: "EDA Dashboards"
author: "Essha Khan & Shuyu Bai"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    bibliography: references.bib
    csl: csl/econometrica.csl
    toc: true
---
![Software Skillls by Role Category](figures/SoftwareSkills_Dashboard.png)

![Specialized Skills by Role Category](figures/SpecializedSkills_Dashboard.png)

![Certifications by Role Category](figures/Certifications_Dashboard.png)

![Soft Skills by Role Category](figures/SoftSkills_Dashboard.png)

![](figures/EDA.png)
